_publications._publicationTitle: Mass spectrometric insights into the protein composition of human cutaneous neurofibromas: comparison of neurofibromas with the overlying skin.

_contextSnippet: The successful dissection of the cNF tissue from the overlying skin was confirmed by the 2.21-fold (95% CI 1.69 to 2.88, P < 0.001) expression of the Schwann cell marker S100B in cNFs compared to skin.
details: 2.21-fold (95% CI 1.69 to 2.88, P < 0.001) expression in cNFs compared to skin, confirming successful dissection of cNF tissue from overlying skin
